# title

**Instance Property**

A localized title for a visited page.

## Declaration

```swift
var title: String? { get }
```

## Accessing visit properties

- **dateOfLastVisit**: The date of the person’s last page visit.
- **httpGet**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the visit is an HTTP GET request.
- **loadedSuccessfully**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the page loads without errors.
- **url**: A URL for the visited page.
- **visitCount**: A count of how many visits the page received.
